allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys nb = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(''Last 3 cell IDs:''\) for c in nb[''cells''][-3:]: print\(f'' id={c.get\(""id"",""?""\)} type={c[""cell_type""]} src={repr\("""".join\(c[""source""]\)[:60]\)}''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys nb = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(''All cell IDs:''\) for i, c in enumerate\(nb[''cells'']\): print\(f'' [{i}] id={repr\(c.get\(""id"",""?""\)\)} type={c[""cell_type""]} src={repr\("""".join\(c[""source""]\)[:50]\)}''\) ")
